name: Sash
description: Jewel-toned ribbons crossing the cloth on the diagonal, a pinstripe running alongside — every redraw re-drapes the silks.

code.style: --silk: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --pin: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* band and pinstripe share one emitted angle so they stay parallel */ --sa: @p(45deg, -45deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -26%; top: @rand(26%, 44%); width: 152%; height: @rand(20%, 34%); background: var(--silk); opacity: 0.9; transform: rotate(@var(--sa)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -26%; top: @rand(66%, 78%); width: 152%; height: calc(14px / @Y); background: var(--pin); opacity: 0.85; transform: rotate(@var(--sa)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
